NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-19-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

DEPT 7. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. REPORTER:M.NORMAN. CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT. DEFT PRESENT IN PRO-PER. BOTH SIDES ARGUE PLTFF'S MOTIONS IN LIMINE. ROLL CALL OF PROSPECTIVE JURORS AND SWORN AS TO THEIR QUALIFICATIONS. JURY SELECTION COMMENCED. PANEL ADMONISHED AND ORDERED TO RETURN AT 10AM 4-27-95 TO DEPT 7.
PROPOSED VOIR DIRE, MOTIONS IN LIMINE AND PROPOSED JURY INSTRUCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF.

DEPT 7. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. REPORTER:M. NORMAN. CLERK:G.SHULL CASE SETTLED IN CHAMBERS ON THE RECORD. PANEL IS THANKED AND EXCUSED. PLTFF TO PREPARE STIPULATED JUDGMENT. COURT WAIVES ALL PER DIEM FEES OF PLTFF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIROUZAN, GUITY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: ONE ST. FRANCIS PLACE #5309, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL MAY-30-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTFF WAIVES CLAIM FOR BACK RENT THROUGH 5-30-95. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & ATNYS FEES. DEFT WAIVES ALL CLAIMS.WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT STAYED TO 5-30-95 AT 12 NOON. DEFT WAIVES ANY FURTHER APPLICATIONS FOR STAYS. SEE STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER STIPULATIONS. PLTFF TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT.
